items.title: Detailed Quiz Analytics
items.description: SmartWinnr provides detailed real-time quiz analytics which will help you in getting a clear insight into the performance of the participants in the quizzes.

items.title: How 'Import question' is  different from 'Add New Question'?
items.description: The following are the main differences between creating questions using the 'Add New Question' method and bulk upload method.

items.title: How can I duplicate a quiz?
items.description: You can duplicate an existing quiz. The quiz name, description and questions in the quiz will get copied into the new quiz.

items.title: How can I track improvement?
items.description: The Quiz Analytics Dashboard provides a comprehensive view of quiz performance, learner participation, and engagement across your organization.

items.title: How Editors evaluate Long Answer Questions?
items.description: Evaluation is a systematic process of analyzing the user responses to determine the correctness of the response.

items.title: How to activate automatic reminders for your quizzes
items.description: Automated reminder feature allows you to create and schedule reminders to be delivered to the quiz takers about their assigned quizzes.

items.title: How to add a 'Video' to a question.
items.description: You can add a video to a question or to feedback in a question.

items.title: How to add an 'Audio file' to a question.
items.description: You can add an audio file to a question or feedback.

items.title: How to add an 'Image' to the question.
items.description: You can add an image to a question or feedback.

items.title: How to allow multiple attempts
items.description: We have implemented a new logic for quizzes where Allow Multiple Attempts is enabled.

items.title: How to Answer Long  Answer type Questions in SmartWinnr?
items.description: You can follow the below steps to answer such Long - answer type Questions in SmartWinnr.

items.title: How to create 'Fill-In-The-Blank' Questions.
items.description: The fill-in-the-blanks question allows participants to write text answers. Please note that the answers given by the participants need to exactly match the…

items.title: How to create 'Long Answer' Questions?
items.description: Long answer questions are generally open-ended questions that require participants to construct a response.

items.title: How to create 'Multiple-Choice Questions'.
items.description: 1. Navigate to EDITOR > LEARNING AND KNOWLEDGE > Questions and Quizzes > Question Bank. 2. Click on the 'Add New Question' button at the top right corner.

items.title: How to create 'Numeric Type Questions'
items.description: In a Numeric Type question, you specify a numeric value as the correct answer and define an allowable error margin.

items.title: How to create a 'Drag and Drop into Text question '?
items.description: A Drag and Drop into Text question requires participants to select and drag text options from an answer bank into specific blanks within the question text.

items.title: How to create a 'Hotspot Question'.
items.description: A Hotspot refers to a predefined area within an image, defined by specific pixel coordinates, that represents the correct answer.

items.title: How to create a 'Matching Question'.
items.description: A matching question enables participants to correctly pair items from one list with corresponding items in a second list.

items.title: How to create a Drag and Drop into Image Question?
items.description: A Drag and Drop into Image Question allows the participants to drag and drop the correct answer to the given image.

items.title: How to create a manual quiz?
items.description: Navigate to Editor > LEARNING AND KNOWLEDGE > Questions and Quizzes > View All Quizzes -> Add New Quiz.

items.title: How to create a missing words question?
items.description: A Missing Words question enables participants to complete a sentence or phrase by selecting the correct word(s) from a predefined list of options.

items.title: How to create an automatic quiz?
items.description: Navigate to Editor > Learning and Knowledge > Questions and Quizzes > View All Quizzes. Click Add New Quiz.

items.title: How to create an Event Quiz
items.description: To create an event quiz, follow the below steps.

items.title: How to create Re-order Questions ?
items.description: A Re-Order question in SmartWinnr allows participants to drag and arrange answer options into the correct sequence.

items.title: How to create Short Answer With Multiple Options
items.description: A Short Answer with Multiple Matches Question allows the participants to choose one answer to a particular question from a list of options provided.

items.description: Sometimes you want to add a link to an external site in your Question body or the Feedback section.

items.title: How To Find The Progress Of Your Team In Quizzes
items.description: SmartWinnr allows you to track the quiz progress of your team from SmartWinnr Manager-View.

items.description: The Question Bank in SmartWinnr serves as the central repository for all questions created within your division.

items.title: Quiz Analytics through Charts
items.description: SmartWinnr allows you to analytics the knowledge of your team based on their performance in the quizzes assigned to them.

items.title: Quiz Comparison Report
items.description: The Quiz Comparison Report provides a comparative view of multiple quizzes created in SmartWinnr.

items.title: Understanding knowledge categories
items.description: Knowledge categories provide a structured way to organise and classify your organisation’s critical information within the SmartWinnr platform.

items.title: Understanding the Learner Management Tab on the Quiz Dashboard
items.description: This tab provides insights into individual learners and categorizes users by performance and risk level.

items.title: Understanding the Overview Tab on the Quiz Dashboard
items.description: This tab provides a high-level snapshot of quiz activity, performance, and engagement.

items.title: Understanding the Participation Tab on the Quiz Dashboard
items.description: This tab focuses on engagement patterns, completion status, and when learners are most active with quizzes.

items.title: Understanding the Performance Tab on the Quiz Dashboard
items.description: This tab provides detailed analysis of quiz scores, pass/fail rates, and score distribution patterns.

items.title: What is SmartWinnr Quiz Analytics?
items.description: SmartWinnr provides a very detailed set of analytics on every quiz that you have created and assigned to people.
